description.zh: in-repo packages/cli 的 forgeax 命令适配 · spawn `forgeax chat --stream` 子进程,ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus。实际 runner 在 server/src/cli-providers/forgeax/,本 plugin 声明 metadata + Bus 入口。
description.en: In-repo packages/cli 'forgeax' command adapter. Spawns `forgeax chat --stream` and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the Bus. Real runner lives in server/src/cli-providers/forgeax/; this plugin declares metadata + Bus entry.
